summary: The user is focused on improving their Instagram engagement for their handmade jewelry business, targeting young adults interested in unique accessories. They have successfully collaborated with an influencer and are planning a Facebook ad campaign to reach a similar audience, utilizing strategies like polls and behind-the-scenes content to engage followers.
facts: The user creates handmade jewelry and targets young adults interested in unique accessories. The user recently collaborated with an influencer who promoted their product to her 10,000 followers, resulting in a successful campaign. The user has been using Instagram Stories to give followers sneak peeks into their production process and ask for feedback on new products. The user conducted a poll last week on Instagram, asking followers to vote for their favorite product design, which received around 50 votes. The user plans to run another Facebook ad campaign targeting people who have shown interest in similar products, similar to a previous campaign that reached around 2,000 people and resulted in 50 clicks to their website.
